block_00: 42 trading tournaments with a total prize pool of $34,500! Jump in!
block_06: Five rounds of the first IQ Option Social Trading Cup are left behind, and we already have the strongest country in the Winners Bracket — Argentina! However, all participants still have a chance to win the entire competition. Time to show your trading skills at its best!
block_07: Get acquainted with the schedule and jump in to win prizes!👇
block_17: Each country faces off with another country in every round match. Each tournament has five winners, the country that took the majority of winning positions goes to the next round in the Winners Bracket, while the loser country gets to the Losers Bracket to try its luck there and take one more chance to get to the final.
block_18: Please note, that you can only sign up for the tournaments where your country participates.
block_19: All participating traders start the tournament with the same tournament balance. The prize pool is fixed for every tournament.
block_20: *One will get a share of the prize fund only in case of winning the tournament.
